name: Anhui Yingjia Distillery Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Yingjia Distillery Co., Ltd. operates in the brewing industry. The company offers wine. It markets its products to approximately 20 provinces, municipalities, and autonomous regions in China. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Lu'an, China. Anhui Yingjia Distillery Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Anhui Yingjia Group.
